rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes for port-level contracts, not implementation scopes
Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE annexes to avoid type errors
generic_rules: Ensure all identifiers in AGREE annexes are visible or declared within the same annex
Use concrete bounds or named constants when specifying input envelopes or output ranges in component type contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE guarantees must reference valid expressions with known types
Component type contracts should define range assumptions using visible feature names or constants
anti_patterns: Do not reference non-existent identifiers or property sets in AGREE annexes
Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about package or property set visibility
